# smart-punctuation-allowlist: files permitted to still contain em-dash (U+2014) / en-dash (U+2013).
# Enforced by scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1. This is a SHRINKING backlog (AGENTS.md 3.14 ban).
# A separate dedicated PR purges these + removes them here; an allowlisted file that is already CLEAN fails the check (forces atomic de-listing).
# One repo-relative path per line (forward slashes).
